# The Course in Positive Philosophy

*[Comte](../philosophers/comte.md) · 1830*

The founding work of positivism, in six volumes. Comte lays out the 'law of the three stages': the human mind passes from theological explanation to metaphysics, then to the positive stage, where it gives up hidden causes to hold only to the laws that observation establishes. Science becomes here the model and the endpoint of all knowledge.
